title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions
company: Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions:
Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions!
